thinking:
**Analyzing File Size Discrepancies**

I've realized the file size discrepancy stems from Antigravity's `view_file` limitation. It appears the tool doesn't read the whole file in one go because it limits the number of lines read. This explains why I only saw 4380 bytes when the file is clearly larger. Now I'm focused on how to circumvent this line-limit.

args.Description: "Atualiza o script de restauração para pesquisar em todos os transcripts históricos por write_to_file do CompanyDashboard.tsx."
args.toolAction: "Atualizando script JS temporário para vasculhar conversas passadas em busca de escritas completas do arquivo original"
